---
title: "Research"
---

## Overview

[One paragraph describing your research program: the problems you care about,
why they matter, and the approaches you use.]

## Research interests

- **[Topic 1]** — [One sentence on what you study and why.]
- **[Topic 2]** — [One sentence.]
- **[Topic 3]** — [One sentence.]

## Current projects

### [Project name]

[Brief description: goal, methods, collaborators, expected outcomes.]

- **Status:** Ongoing
- **Links:** [Paper](https://example.com) · [Code](https://github.com) · [Data](https://example.com)

### [Project name]

[Brief description.]

- **Status:** Completed / In review
- **Links:** [Preprint](https://example.com)

## Methods & tools

[List techniques, datasets, software, or experimental systems you work with.]

- Method or tool A
- Method or tool B
- Method or tool C
